name: Spiced Pumpkin Cookies
snippet: Fall is my favorite time of year. I love the crispness of the air, changing of the leaves, wearing fashionable boots and jackets, but most off all, I love everything PUMPKIN! Pumpkin pie, pumpkin donuts, pumpkin muffins, pumpkin lattes, pumpkin bread, pumpkin cake, pumpkin ice cream, pumpkin cheesecake and I can’t forget, pumpkin rolls. I feel a sugar coma coming on just typing this! Given my love for the gourd, I knew I had to create a clean pumpkin treat that I could enjoy this time of year and not feel guilt or shame. I am so glad that I did, but now I have to keep myself eating the entire batch! They are that good. If you are obsessed with pumpkin like I am, you will definitely want to make these. Without further ado…introducing, Spiced Pumpkin Cookies!!!
